name: Apple Nut Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: 40 minutes
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a mixing bowl, cream together shortening and sugar. Add eggs and vanilla, beating well. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Alternating with sour cream, add the flour mixture to the creamed mixture. Fold in apples. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan or large greased bundt pan. Sprinkle nut mixture evenly over batter. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
